note: 修改此文件即可调整每日新闻搜索范围，下次 cron 自动生效。所有搜索均自动加 freshness:pd（过去24小时）。

dimensions.label: Newsletter / 周报聚合
queries: "last week in AI" OR "AI weekly roundup" latest

dimensions.label: 社区热度 / 病毒传播
queries: "viral AI tool" OR "AI trending" site:reddit.com OR site:news.ycombinator.com
"GitHub trending AI" OR "AI open source" trending

dimensions.label: 模型发布 / 产品更新
queries: "AI model release" OR "LLM launch" OR "foundation model"
"大模型" OR "AI产品发布" OR "AI新功能"
OpenAI OR Anthropic OR Google OR Meta AI announcement

dimensions.label: 融资 / 财务 / 股票
queries: AI startup "seed" OR "series A" OR "series B" OR "series C" funding
"AI acquisition" OR "AI IPO" OR "AI股票" OR "AI市值"
"AI 融资" OR "人工智能投资" site:36kr.com OR site:latepost.com
AI stock earnings OR results "beats" OR "misses"

dimensions.label: 监管 / 政策
queries: "AI regulation" OR "AI policy" OR "AI law" latest
"AI 监管" OR "人工智能法案"

dimensions.label: 一级市场 / VC 圈
queries: 晚点LatePost OR 36kr OR IT桔子 AI 融资 初创

dimensions.label: 自定义关注（小妈妈随时添加）
dimensions.note: 在这里加新的搜索词，下次日报就会覆盖。格式和上方一样，每条 query 是一个字符串。
